_comment: Platform/deployment constants for ai-transport, owned by Platform Governance (Vlad) per ADR-022 §10 Policy Ownership. No Process may modify its own Policy. Introduced by ADR-030 (Controlled Full-Mesh Transport Access).
max_hops_rationale: ADR-030 §3.2: deliberately NOT derived from current participant count (5). Independent platform constant, tunable without redefining loop-protection every time Orchestra gains or loses a participant.

circuit_breaker.on_trigger: Suspend all new writes platform-wide, notify Vlad. Provisional values (ADR-030 §3.5) — not yet tuned against real usage.
circuit_breaker.enforcement_note: No automated monitor currently reads this file. Enforcement requires either a GitHub Action or an n8n workflow watching write volume; neither exists yet. Until one does, this section is a declared intent, not a live control.

dead_letter_reasons.SCHEMA_INVALID: write failed schemas/mission.schema.json validation at commit time (ADR-030 §3.4)

access_note: ADR-030 authorizes full-mesh access for all 5. Physical provisioning for ChatGPT/Gemini/Perplexity is a separate, unfinished step (platform/account-level setup on each of those services), not something writable from this repo alone.
